query:
You are working on the thunderbird/thunderbird-android repository.
The codebase is at version 8.0 (commit: 49e00c47).

## Issue to Resolve

"Sent” folder: Missing space between "To" and address
### Checklist

- [X] I have used the search function to see if someone else has already submitted the same bug report.
- [X] I will describe the problem with as much detail as possible.

### App version

6.804

### Where did you get the app from?

None

### Android version

GrapheneOS

### Device model

_No response_

### Steps to reproduce

Imo not necessary.

### Expected behavior

Space.

### Actual behavior

Missing space.

![Screenshot 2024-09-25 143623 - ss](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c4cb1785-2874-47e0-9e06-4155072c7330)


### Logs

_No response_

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

Thanks for reporting, can confirm. This should be a super easy fix if all goes well, would you be interested in looking into it?
Hey! 

I'm interested in contributing to this issue.

I already found a solution but I don't if a good way to solve it.

I changed the `getRecipientDisplayNames` in `MessageHelper.kt` in line 37 to append a whitespace before append the recipients list.

Also I saw that you don't have unit tests for this method, if you agree I can write some

Hope to get your feedback.

Thanks!
@alvar0liveira I'm excited you're ready to contribute! Why don't you go ahead and send a pull request with what you have? The team will take a look and review. Unit tests would be great!

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `legacy/core/src/main/java/com/fsck/k9/helper/MessageHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I understand the issue. The `message_to_label` resource string is "To:" (with a colon but no space), and the `getRecipientDisplayNames` method directly appends the recipients without adding a space. This results in "To:address" instead of "To: address".

Let me fix this by adding a space after the prefix:

1→package com.fsck.k9.helper
  2→
  3→import android.graphics.Color
  4→import android.text.SpannableString
  5→import app.k9mail.core.android.common.contact.Contact
  6→import app.k9mail.core.android.common.contact.ContactRepository
  7→import app.k9mail.core.android.testing.RobolectricTest
  8→import app.k9mail.core.common.mail.EmailAddress
  9→import app.k9mail.core.common.mail.toEmailAddressOrThrow
 10→import assertk.assertThat
 11→import assertk.assertions.isEqualTo
 12→import assertk.assertions.isInstanceOf
 13→import com.fsck.k9.helper.MessageHelper.Companion.toFriendly
 14→import com.fsck.k9.mail.Address
 15→import org.junit.Test
 16→import org.mockito.kotlin.doReturn
 17→import org.mockito.kotlin.mock
 18→import org.mockito.kotlin.stub
 19→
 20→class MessageHelperTest : RobolectricTest() {
 21→
 22→    private val contactRepository: ContactRepository = mock()
 23→
 24→    @Test
 25→    fun testToFriendlyShowsPersonalPartIfItExists() {
 26→        val address = Address("test@testor.com", "Tim Testor")
 27→        assertThat(toFriendly(address, contactRepository)).isEqualTo("Tim Testor")
 28→    }
 29→
 30→    @Test
 31→    fun testToFriendlyShowsEmailPartIfNoPersonalPartExists() {
 32→        val address = Address("test@testor.com")
 33→        assertThat(toFriendly(address, contactRepository)).isEqualTo("test@testor.com")
 34→    }
 35→
 36→    @Test
 37→    fun testToFriendlyArray() {
 38→        val address1 = Address("test@testor.com", "Tim Testor")
 39→        val address2 = Address("foo@bar.com", "Foo Bar")
 40→        val addresses = arrayOf(address1, address2)
 41→        assertThat(toFriendly(addresses, contactRepository).toString()).isEqualTo("Tim Testor,Foo Bar")
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    @Test
 45→    fun testToFriendlyWithContactLookup() {
 46→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address)
 47→        setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
 48→
 49→        assertThat(toFriendly(address, contactRepository)).isEqualTo("Tim Testor")
 50→    }
 51→
 52→    @Test
 53→    fun testToFriendlyWithChangeContactColor() {
 54→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address)
 55→        setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
 56→
 57→        val friendly = toFriendly(
 58→            address = address,
 59→            contactRepository = contactRepository,
 60→            showCorrespondentNames = true,
 61→            changeContactNameColor = true,
 62→            contactNameColor = Color.RED,
 63→        )
 64→        assertThat(friendly).isInstanceOf<SpannableString>()
 65→        assertThat(friendly.toString()).isEqualTo("Tim Testor")
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    @Test
 69→    fun testToFriendlyWithoutCorrespondentNames() {
 70→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address, "Tim Testor")
 71→        setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
 72→
 73→        val friendly = toFriendly(
 74→            address = address,
 75→            contactRepository = contactRepository,
 76→            showCorrespondentNames = false,
 77→            changeContactNameColor = false,
 78→            contactNameColor = 0,
 79→        )
 80→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("test@testor.com")
 81→    }
 82→
 83→    @Test
 84→    fun toFriendly_spoofPreventionOverridesPersonal() {
 85→        val address = Address("test@testor.com", "potus@whitehouse.gov")
 86→        val friendly = toFriendly(address, contactRepository)
 87→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("test@testor.com")
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    @Test
 91→    fun toFriendly_atPrecededByOpeningParenthesisShouldNotTriggerSpoofPrevention() {
 92→        val address = Address("gitlab@gitlab.example", "username (@username)")
 93→        val friendly = toFriendly(address, contactRepository)
 94→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("username (@username)")
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    @Test
 98→    fun toFriendly_nameStartingWithAtShouldNotTriggerSpoofPrevention() {
 99→        val address = Address("address@domain.example", "@username")
100→        val friendly = toFriendly(address, contactRepository)
101→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("@username")
102→    }
103→
104→    @Test
105→    fun toFriendly_spoofPreventionDoesntOverrideContact() {
106→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address, "Tim Testor")
107→        setupContactRepositoryWithSpoofContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
108→
109→        val friendly = toFriendly(
110→            address = address,
111→            contactRepository = contactRepository,
112→            showCorrespondentNames = true,
113→            changeContactNameColor = false,
114→            contactNameColor = 0,
115→        )
116→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("Tim@Testor")
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(emailAddress: EmailAddress) {
120→        contactRepository.stub {
121→            on { getContactFor(emailAddress) } doReturn
122→                Contact(
123→                    id = 1L,
124→                    name = "Tim Testor",
125→                    emailAddress = emailAddress,
126→                    uri = mock(),
127→                    photoUri = null,
128→                )
129→        }
130→    }
131→
132→    private fun setupContactRepositoryWithSpoofContact(emailAddress: EmailAddress) {
133→        contactRepository.stub {
134→            on { getContactFor(emailAddress) } doReturn
135→                Contact(
136→                    id = 1L,
137→                    name = "Tim@Testor",
138→                    emailAddress = emailAddress,
139→                    uri = mock(),
140→                    photoUri = null,
141→                )
142→        }
143→    }
144→
145→    private companion object {
146→        val EMAIL_ADDRESS = "test@testor.com".toEmailAddressOrThrow()
147→    }
148→}
149→

 12→import assertk.assertions.isInstanceOf

 14→import com.fsck.k9.mail.Address

 20→class MessageHelperTest : RobolectricTest() {
 21→
 22→    private val contactRepository: ContactRepository = mock()
 23→
 24→    @Test
 25→    fun testToFriendlyShowsPersonalPartIfItExists() {
 26→        val address = Address("test@testor.com", "Tim Testor")
 27→        assertThat(toFriendly(address, contactRepository)).isEqualTo("Tim Testor")
 28→    }
 29→
 30→    @Test
 31→    fun testToFriendlyShowsEmailPartIfNoPersonalPartExists() {
 32→        val address = Address("test@testor.com")
 33→        assertThat(toFriendly(address, contactRepository)).isEqualTo("test@testor.com")
 34→    }
 35→
 36→    @Test
 37→    fun testToFriendlyArray() {
 38→        val address1 = Address("test@testor.com", "Tim Testor")
 39→        val address2 = Address("foo@bar.com", "Foo Bar")
 40→        val addresses = arrayOf(address1, address2)
 41→        assertThat(toFriendly(addresses, contactRepository).toString()).isEqualTo("Tim Testor,Foo Bar")
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    @Test
 45→    fun testToFriendlyWithContactLookup() {
 46→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address)
 47→        setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
 48→
 49→        assertThat(toFriendly(address, contactRepository)).isEqualTo("Tim Testor")
 50→    }
 51→
 52→    @Test
 53→    fun testToFriendlyWithChangeContactColor() {
 54→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address)
 55→        setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
 56→
 57→        val friendly = toFriendly(
 58→            address = address,
 59→            contactRepository = contactRepository,
 60→            showCorrespondentNames = true,
 61→            changeContactNameColor = true,
 62→            contactNameColor = Color.RED,
 63→        )
 64→        assertThat(friendly).isInstanceOf<SpannableString>()
 65→        assertThat(friendly.toString()).isEqualTo("Tim Testor")
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    @Test
 69→    fun testToFriendlyWithoutCorrespondentNames() {
 70→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address, "Tim Testor")
 71→        setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
 72→
 73→        val friendly = toFriendly(
 74→            address = address,
 75→            contactRepository = contactRepository,
 76→            showCorrespondentNames = false,
 77→            changeContactNameColor = false,
 78→            contactNameColor = 0,
 79→        )
 80→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("test@testor.com")
 81→    }
 82→
 83→    @Test
 84→    fun toFriendly_spoofPreventionOverridesPersonal() {
 85→        val address = Address("test@testor.com", "potus@whitehouse.gov")
 86→        val friendly = toFriendly(address, contactRepository)
 87→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("test@testor.com")
 88→    }
 89→
 90→    @Test
 91→    fun toFriendly_atPrecededByOpeningParenthesisShouldNotTriggerSpoofPrevention() {
 92→        val address = Address("gitlab@gitlab.example", "username (@username)")
 93→        val friendly = toFriendly(address, contactRepository)
 94→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("username (@username)")
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    @Test
 98→    fun toFriendly_nameStartingWithAtShouldNotTriggerSpoofPrevention() {
 99→        val address = Address("address@domain.example", "@username")
100→        val friendly = toFriendly(address, contactRepository)
101→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("@username")
102→    }
103→
104→    @Test
105→    fun toFriendly_spoofPreventionDoesntOverrideContact() {
106→        val address = Address(EMAIL_ADDRESS.address, "Tim Testor")
107→        setupContactRepositoryWithSpoofContact(EMAIL_ADDRESS)
108→
109→        val friendly = toFriendly(
110→            address = address,
111→            contactRepository = contactRepository,
112→            showCorrespondentNames = true,
113→            changeContactNameColor = false,
114→            contactNameColor = 0,
115→        )
116→        assertThat(friendly).isEqualTo("Tim@Testor")
117→    }
118→
119→    private fun setupContactRepositoryWithFakeContact(emailAddress: EmailAddress) {
120→        contactRepository.stub {
121→            on { getContactFor(emailAddress) } doReturn
122→                Contact(
123→                    id = 1L,
124→                    name = "Tim Testor",
125→                    emailAddress = emailAddress,
126→                    uri = mock(),
127→                    photoUri = null,
128→                )
129→        }
130→    }
131→
132→    private fun setupContactRepositoryWithSpoofContact(emailAddress: EmailAddress) {
133→        contactRepository.stub {
134→            on { getContactFor(emailAddress) } doReturn
135→                Contact(
136→                    id = 1L,
137→                    name = "Tim@Testor",
138→                    emailAddress = emailAddress,
139→                    uri = mock(),
140→                    photoUri = null,
141→                )
142→        }
143→    }
144→
145→    private companion object {
146→        val EMAIL_ADDRESS = "test@testor.com".toEmailAddressOrThrow()
147→    }
148→}
